description_long: This is a medium-sized bottle with a wide, conical blue glass body that tapers upward to a narrow neck, sealed with a cork stopper. Around the lower half of the bottle, there is a textured, dark gray band that appears to be a protective or decorative sleeve, possibly made of rubber or fabric. The bottle's glass is translucent, allowing some light to pass through but obscuring clear visibility of the interior. On one side of the sleeve, there is a small, vertical barcode label, suggesting it is a commercial or reusable item. The overall design is utilitarian yet modern, suitable for carrying liquids in an urban environment. The bottle's base is flat and stable, making it easy to place on various surfaces.
description: A blue, translucent bottle with a cork stopper and a dark gray textured sleeve around its lower half, featuring a small barcode label. The bottle has a wide base and a narrow neck, giving it a modern, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue bottle with a cork stopper and the barcode label clearly visible on the right side of the dark gray sleeve.
description_view_1: Rotated view where the barcode label is now more centered, and the bottle's conical shape and sleeve are prominent.
description_view_2: Side view with the barcode label barely visible at the edge, emphasizing the continuous dark gray sleeve and the bottle's symmetry.
description_view_3: Rear view with the barcode label not visible, showing the uninterrupted blue glass and dark gray sleeve.
attribute_label_or_branding: A small, vertical barcode label is present on the side of the dark gray sleeve. No other branding or text is visible.
